elements.text: The world has got better at collaborating remotely on technologies

Progress since 2018
There has been an explosion of technology to help work together: to meet better online, share videos and demonstrations.
Major adjustment for STEM education e.g. practicals from home, remote training, which open science hardware has facilitated. 
Opportunities
Experimenting with collaborative models and disseminating best practices in documentation, design and testing.
Expanding geographically by reducing reliance on in-person events, while still accounting for tacit knowledge and know-how requirements.
